obj_npc_castle_town_mizzle_slash_Step_0_: * All my hard work is finally paying off!/%
* All YOU did was start at a slightly higher level than me!!/%
* Hey^1, lady^1! Listen^1! This guy can only do a stupid knife throwing attack!!/%
* Wow^1, you can throw knives^1? How resplended.../%
* Rudinn..^1. I thought you were next to me because you were my friend./
* It's not my fault I'm inherently better than you in every way./
* If you're jealous..^1. try getting your palette swapped./%
* H-HA^1! Like I need to resort to something like THAT!/%
* Where I hail from^1, most people don't even have arms^1. Haha./%
* I've heard people can even throw parties^1. But how^1? Isn't that 3 heroes?/%
* Haha^1! I love throwing^1! One crazy night^1, I cut loose and even threw a "b-a-l-l".../%
* It was..^1. yay big^1. (Big enough that when I threw it everyone said yay)/%

obj_npc_hammerguy_slash_Step_0_gml_46_0: * Now I can DO THE THING I WAS SUPPOSED TO BE DOING./%

obj_npc_rabbits_slash_Step_0_gml_83_0: * ..^1. some people are just hopeless^1, QC^1! You can't help them!/%

obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_106_0: * From here^1, let your love grow^1. All right./%
obj_npc_room_slash_Other_10_gml_112_0: * I've never seen a sun so dark^1. You made an oasis for us!/%
